sourceMovie.title: Fast Charlie
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Fast Charlie works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Polar
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Fast Charlie clicked for you, Polar (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and crime, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Fast Charlie?
faq.answer: Try Polar, The Enforcer, Gone Baby Gone—each shares DNA with Fast Charlie while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Fast Charlie?
faq.answer: Fast Charlie (2023) is best described as Action, Crime, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Fast Charlie worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.2/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
